The '''Mos Eisley Towers''' was a hotel in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Besides the restaurant and lobby, the entire complex was located underground.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1st}}
